prompt:
Today is {{current_date}} (Monday). Generate a comprehensive weekly system health and engineering hygiene report template. Include the following sections:

## 🔍 Infrastructure Health Checklist
- List 5 critical infrastructure metrics to review
- List 3 security hygiene tasks

## 📊 Performance Benchmarks
- List key performance indicators a backend team should track weekly

## 🐛 Incident Review Template
- Provide a structured template for reviewing any incidents from the past week

## 🚀 Deployment Health
- List items to verify about last week's deployments

## 📅 Week Ahead Priorities
- Suggest a framework for setting engineering priorities for the week

Format with clear headers and bullet points. Keep each section concise and actionable.
